steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtract each term inside the parentheses:
$5x^3 - 3x + 8 - (9x^6 + 5x - 3) = 5x^3 - 3x + 8 - 9x^6 - 5x + 3$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$-4x^{2}-8x-11$': Wrong leading degree ($x^2$ instead of $x^6$) and wrong sign on the constant. ✗
  • Choice B — '$-9x^{6}+5x^{3}-8x+11$': Matches the simplified result exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — '$-9x^{6}+5x^{3}+2x+5$': Wrong $x$ coefficient ($+2x$ instead of $-8x$) and wrong constant. ✗
  • Choice D — '$-4x^{9}-2x+5$': Wrong leading degree and wrong coefficients throughout. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
